docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,857.67 FILED BY JONES ERICA AS TO DEFENDANT CARROLL EDWARD ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR APR-23-1992 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 05
